name: Mini Shape Shifting
description: Get ready for one of the most exciting, fast-paced, and action-packed racing adventures in Shape Shifting Race Game. This thrilling transformation racing game brings a completely unique gameplay experience where players must quickly change vehicles and adapt to different environments in order to win challenging races. With exciting tracks, colorful graphics, smooth controls, and fun gameplay mechanics, this game offers endless entertainment for players of all ages.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
